name: Yam & Apple Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the sweet potatoes and slice thinly.
2. Core the apple and cut into thin slices (or peel if desired).
3. Layer the apples and sweet potatoes in a square baking dish.
4. Mix the applesauce with water and pour over the layered ingredients.
5. Sprinkle with cinnamon, if desired.
6. Cover and bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
7. Serve hot or cold.
